title: Aurora, 33840, Palm Pals Bart Blobfish 5In, Soft Toy, Pink
features: Introducing Palm Pals Bart Blobfish, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection. Bart Blobfish has been through many challenges in life while travelling from the deep waters of the ocean. It is a soft pink coloured cute and cuddly soft toy filled with beans that perfectly fit in your hand.

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. Bart Blobfish is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

This adorable Bart Blobfish soft toy comes under the Palm Pals Aquatic collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range offers a variety of collections like Craving, Pets, Zoo, Whimsical and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Bart Blobfish measures 13cm. This soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable soft pink colour fish toy which has a big puffy nose. This is a hugely collectable range.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming, pink-coloured soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
description: Product Description Introducing Bart Blobfish, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection is a soft and cuddly plush toy filled with beans that fit perfectly in your hand. Bart Blobfish has been through many challenges in life while travelling from the deep waters of the ocean. It is a soft pink coloured cute and cuddly toy filled with beans that perfectly fit in your hand. Bart Blobfish is part of the Palm Pals Aquatic collection, which is just one of the many wonderful collections offered by Palm Pals like Craving, Pets, Zoo, Sports and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute. Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Bart Blobfish soft toy measures 13cm. These gorgeous and irresistibly cute toys make great gifts for any occasion whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable pink-coloured Blobfish with a big puffy nose. This is a hugely collectable range. As part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, Bart Blobfish comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable and cloth labels are made from recycled materials. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience designing and manufacturing innovative, high-quality plush products. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
